publishedAbstract: + After installing Openshift Data Foundation (ODF), the default backing store for the MultiCloud Gateway is stuck in `Initializing` status, although its phase is `Ready`. Inspecting some `oc` outputs: # oc get backingstore NAME TYPE PHASE AGE noobaa-default-backing-store aws-s3 Ready 6m58s However: # oc get backingstore noobaa-default-backing-store-o yaml | grep " modeCode:" modeCode: INITIALIZING In a typical scenario, if the backingstore is `Ready`, its mode should have transitioned to `Optimal`. + Why is this issue observed? How to fix it?
publishedTitle: Why is the Multicloud Gateway default backing store stuck in `Initializing` status?
